Boat Details

Description

Rebel Scum is a beautifully maintained freshwater cruiser that reflects decades of attentive ownership. Re-powered in 2009 with a reliable Yanmar 3YM20. In 2023, the hoses and belts were replaced. In 2019, a professional Awlgrip paint job was completed. The standing rigging and much of the running rigging were replaced around 2021. Below deck, the galley is upgraded with an Origo 3000 Alcohol Pad 2-Burner stove.

Located at Montrose Harbor

Viewing by Appointment Only


Contact Information
Please contact Bruce Rosenzweig at 312-437-1369
Other Details

Disclaimer

The Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. A buyer should instruct his agents, or his surveyors, to investigate such details as the buyer desires validated. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.

Accommodations

  • (8) Portlights, (4) are opening
  • (1) Deck Hatch
  • Marine Pump Toilet
  • Fiberglass Cabin Sole w/ Carpet Lay-In
  • New Interior Cushions - Blue w/ White Pattern
  • Navigation Station
  • DC Control Panel
  • Classic Brass Fixtures and Clock in Cabin

Galley

  • Origo 3000 Alcohol Pad 2-Burner Stove
  • Single Stainless Steel Sink
  • Icebox
  • Outlets Throughout

Electronics

  • Raymarine Autopilot
  • Raymarine ST60+ wind/depth/speed
  • Standard Horizon CP180 Chartplotter
  • AIS
  • Handheld VHS and GPS Units
  • Shorepower Inlet w/ Cord
  • Battery Charger

Deck & Hull Equipment

  • Anchor w/ Rode & Chain
  • Double Lifelines w/ Gates
  • Bow Pulpit
  • Swim Ladder
  • Teak Hanrails on Deck
  • Teak Toe Rails
  • Navigation Lights
  • (2) Dorade Vents
  • Throwable Horseshoe
  • Lifesling 2 Overboard Rescue System
  • Dock Lines
  • Fenders w/ Covers
  • Life Jackets
  • Flares
  • Winter Cover
  • Steel Cradle

Sails & Rigging

  • Dacron Main Sail - Fully Battoned (Serviced 2022)
  • Dacron Genoa (Serviced 2022)
  • Asymmetrical Spinnaker with Snuffer (Serviced 2022)
  • Doyle Stack Pack
  • Solid Boom Vang
  • Roller Furling
  • Whisker Pole w/ Stanchion Mounts - Forespar 401106
  • Mainsheet Traveler
  • Standing Rigging (Replaced Around 2021)
  • Running Rigging (Most Replaced Around 2021)
  • (5) Standard Winches


Mechanic Equipment & Engine Details

  • Repowered with Yanmar 3YM20 in 2009
  • 2-Blade Bronze Propeller
  • Wheel Steering - Stainless w/ Leather Wrap
  • Manual Bilge Pump
